escalations.description: US and Israel launch joint strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Khamenei [+10 related events]
escalations.investor_summary: US-Israeli strikes killed Supreme Leader Khamenei, Iran retaliated against Gulf states and US bases, Strait of Hormuz collapsed 70%, oil surged 13%, nuclear infrastructure targeted. Houthi Red Sea attacks resumed. This is the most consequential geopolitical event since Feb 2022 and affects global energy supply, shipping, defense equities, and risk premiums across the entire Middle East.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT all related events. Confidence is high (0.85-0.99) across multiple corroborating sources. Flag for continued monitoring — situation is rapidly evolving.

escalations.description: Pakistan declares 'open war' on Afghanistan with airstrikes on Kabul and Kandahar [+1 related events]
escalations.investor_summary: Pakistan declared open war on Afghanistan with airstrikes on Kabul and Kandahar. Active conflict status change for both countries. Affects regional stability, Pakistan sovereign risk, and South Asian investment flows.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. Confirmed by multiple sources with high confidence (0.93-0.98).

escalations.description: US Supreme Court strikes down IEEPA tariffs 6-3, ruling President lacks tariff authority
escalations.investor_summary: SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariffs 6-3; Trump immediately imposed 15% global tariff under Section 122. Fundamental restructuring of US trade policy legal framework. Affects all bilateral trade relationships and global supply chains.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. Supreme Court ruling is definitive (conf=0.99). Section 122 tariff implementation confirmed.

escalations.description: North Korea conducted its first ballistic missile test of 2026 on Jan 4, firing hypersonic missiles from Pyongyang striking a target 900km away. Believed to be Hwasong-16B solid-fueled IRBM capable of [+2 related events]
escalations.investor_summary: New START treaty expired without extension (US-Russia). North Korea tested hypersonic missiles. Russia planning new ICBM tests. Iran nuclear infrastructure targeted in strikes. The global nuclear order is in its most precarious state since the Cold War.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. New START expiry is confirmed. Missile tests reported by multiple defense sources.

escalations.description: Following the capture of Venezuelan President Maduro in January 2026, OFAC issued multiple general licenses easing Venezuela oil sanctions: GL 46A (Feb 10) authorizes broad US company activities in Ve [+2 related events]
escalations.investor_summary: Venezuela oil sanctions eased (OFAC general licenses post-Maduro capture). EU renewed Russia sanctions 6 months. Caesar Act for Syria repealed. Multiple comprehensive sanctions regime changes affecting energy markets and trade flows.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. OFAC and EU Council actions are officially published.

escalations.description: Clashes erupted on Jan 29, 2026 between TPLF and Ethiopian government forces in the Tigray region. ENDF and Tigray Security Forces clashed near the Amhara border using drones, artillery, and heavy wea
escalations.investor_summary: TPLF-government clashes resumed in Tigray using drones and artillery. Threatens the 2022 Pretoria peace agreement. Affects Horn of Africa stability and humanitarian aid flows.
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT with monitoring. Confidence 0.88 — situation is fluid.

signals.description: US and Israel launch joint strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Khamenei
signals.investor_impact: This is a watershed geopolitical event that will fundamentally reshape Middle Eastern security architecture, energy markets, and global risk premiums for months to come.

signals.description: Iran retaliates with missile and drone strikes on Israel and Gulf Arab states
signals.investor_impact: Gulf state infrastructure and tourism sectors face immediate damage; regional risk premiums will spike sharply for UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, and Bahrain sovereign debt and equities.

signals.description: US destroys 9 Iranian warships as Strait of Hormuz traffic collapses 70%
signals.investor_impact: Strait of Hormuz disruption is the most severe global energy supply risk in decades; extended closure would trigger recession-level oil shocks and reignite inflation worldwide.

signals.description: Oil prices surge 13%, global stock futures drop, gold jumps on Iran conflict
signals.investor_impact: Massive risk-off rotation underway; energy, defense, and gold equities benefit while consumer discretionary, airlines, and emerging markets face sharp selloffs.

signals.description: UAE closes Tehran embassy after Iranian missile strikes hit Dubai and Abu Dhabi
signals.investor_impact: Dubai's status as a global aviation and tourism hub faces severe disruption; UAE real estate and financial sectors face immediate confidence crisis.

signals.description: Global flight disruptions: 7,700+ delays and 2,280 cancellations from Iran conflict
signals.investor_impact: Aviation sector faces significant revenue losses; global supply chains relying on Middle Eastern air cargo hubs will experience delays and rerouting costs.

signals.description: Pakistan declares 'open war' on Afghanistan with airstrikes on Kabul and Kandahar
signals.investor_impact: Pakistan sovereign risk increases significantly; border trade disruption and defense spending surge will pressure Pakistan's already strained fiscal position and foreign reserves.

signals.description: US Supreme Court strikes down IEEPA tariffs 6-3, ruling President lacks tariff authority
signals.investor_impact: Landmark ruling reshapes US trade policy authority; creates legal uncertainty for current and future tariff regimes while the administration pivots to alternative legal frameworks.

signals.description: Trump increases China tariffs by 10% and imposes 25% on Canada/Mexico effective March 4
signals.investor_impact: Escalation of multi-front trade war will increase costs for US importers and consumers; Canadian energy and Mexican manufacturing exporters face margin compression.

signals.description: EU announces provisional application of EU-Mercosur trade agreement
signals.investor_impact: The most significant transatlantic trade realignment in a generation; creates strategic counterweight to US tariff offensive for Mercosur agricultural exporters and European manufacturers.

signals.description: Ukraine's southern counteroffensive recaptures 300+ sq km in Zaporizhzhia Oblast
signals.investor_impact: Improved Ukrainian battlefield position strengthens Kyiv's negotiating leverage in ongoing peace talks; may affect European defense sector and energy security calculus.

signals.description: Ukraine's Flamingo cruise missiles strike Votkinsk ICBM factory 1,400 km inside Russia
signals.investor_impact: Disruption to Russia's missile production capability could affect battlefield dynamics and escalation calculations; demonstrates Ukraine's expanding deep-strike capacity.

signals.description: IAEA brokers local ceasefire at Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant for power line repairs
signals.investor_impact: Reduces near-term nuclear safety risks at Europe's largest nuclear plant, though the underlying vulnerability of the facility remains an ongoing concern for European energy security.

signals.description: IMF approves $8.1 billion 4-year loan for Ukraine, anchoring $136.5 billion support package
signals.investor_impact: Provides critical fiscal stabilization for Ukraine; anchors international donor confidence and sets conditions for post-war reconstruction financing.

signals.description: Denmark calls snap election for March 24 amid Greenland-Trump standoff
signals.investor_impact: Danish election likely to reinforce sovereignty-defense policy; Arctic resource competition and NATO dynamics in play for defense and energy investors.

signals.description: Trump bans Anthropic from government use; OpenAI secures Pentagon classified networks deal
signals.investor_impact: Reshapes the AI defense contracting landscape; creates significant regulatory risk for AI companies that resist military use cases while benefiting more government-aligned competitors.

signals.description: North Korea's 9th Party Congress concludes: Kim re-elected, daughter promoted, nuclear expansion planned
signals.investor_impact: Signals continued militarization and nuclear program expansion by North Korea; succession signals may introduce long-term uncertainty about regime stability.

signals.description: PBOC cuts FX forward reserve ratio from 20% to 0% to slow yuan appreciation
signals.investor_impact: Significant shift in China's FX management signals tolerance for yuan weakening; benefits Chinese exporters facing US tariff headwinds while potentially increasing trade tension dynamics.

signals.description: Argentina Senate approves Milei's labor reform bill before state-of-nation address
signals.investor_impact: Landmark reform improves Argentina's labor market flexibility for investors; combined with EU-Mercosur ratification, strengthens Milei's pro-market reform narrative.

signals.description: Argentina and Uruguay first to ratify EU-Mercosur trade agreement
signals.investor_impact: Ratification momentum strengthens the deal's viability; South American agricultural exporters and European industrial manufacturers stand to benefit from reduced tariffs.

signals.description: UK Green Party wins Gorton and Denton by-election, pushing Labour to third place
signals.investor_impact: Signals increasing political fragmentation in the UK; weakened Labour government faces governance challenges that may delay economic reforms.

signals.description: UN Security Council sanctions four RSF commanders for El Fasher atrocities in Sudan
signals.investor_impact: Increases international pressure on RSF leadership but unlikely to alter conflict dynamics; Sudan remains uninvestable for most portfolio investors.

signals.description: Myanmar junta plans April government handover following widely condemned sham elections
signals.investor_impact: Cosmetic civilian transition does not change underlying conflict dynamics or sanctions risk; Myanmar remains largely isolated from global investment flows.

signals.description: Trump imposes 15% global tariff under Section 122 after SCOTUS strikes down IEEPA tariffs
signals.investor_impact: Creates ongoing tariff uncertainty as legal battles continue; the 15% global baseline tariff adds inflationary pressure and reshapes global trade cost structures.

signals.description: Saudi Arabia condemns both Iranian attacks on Gulf states and US-Israeli strikes on Iran
signals.investor_impact: Saudi Arabia's neutral stance signals it will not join the US-Israel military campaign, reducing risk of broader regional conflagration but introducing uncertainty about future US-Saudi alignment.

signals.description: India urges restraint as Iran conflict threatens oil supplies and diaspora safety
signals.investor_impact: Indian economy vulnerable to oil price surge via current account deficit widening; rupee likely under pressure if Strait of Hormuz disruption persists.

signals.description: UN Secretary-General calls Iran strikes 'grave threat to international peace and security'
signals.investor_impact: UN condemnation signals potential multilateral backlash; diplomatic isolation risk for US and Israel may complicate broader foreign policy objectives.

signals.description: Qatar hit by 65 Iranian missiles; Oman's Duqm port struck by drones
signals.investor_impact: Qatar's LNG export infrastructure vulnerability exposed; Oman's port damage highlights supply chain risks for countries previously considered safe from regional conflict.

signals.description: Russia-Ukraine war marks 4th anniversary: Russia occupies 20% of Ukraine, 1.27M Russian casualties
signals.investor_impact: War of attrition continues with no near-term resolution; European defense spending commitments remain elevated, benefiting defense sector equities.

signals.description: Russia attacks Ukraine with 1,500+ drones and 90+ missiles in one week
signals.investor_impact: Sustained Russian air campaign keeps pressure on Ukraine's energy grid and economic output; air defense supply chains remain critical.

signals.description: Nepal holds general election on March 5 for 275-seat House of Representatives
signals.investor_impact: Nepal's political stability and investment climate hang in the balance; election outcome will affect hydropower development and India-China regional influence dynamics.

signals.description: Colombia parliamentary election scheduled for March 8
signals.investor_impact: Colombian equities under pressure from election uncertainty; outcome will determine Petro government's legislative support for remaining reform agenda.

signals.description: Vietnam legislative election scheduled for March 15
signals.investor_impact: Largely predetermined outcome unlikely to shift Vietnam's economic policy direction, but new leadership lineup may affect FDI attraction strategy.

signals.description: Texas primary election for US Senate race on March 3
signals.investor_impact: Texas Senate primary outcome may signal direction of Republican party policy preferences ahead of 2026 midterms; limited direct market impact.

signals.description: Japan deploys Type-12 long-range missile with record defense budget of $58B
signals.investor_impact: Japan's expanding defense industry creates opportunities for domestic defense contractors; signals deepening US-Japan security cooperation in Indo-Pacific.

signals.description: Brazil presidential race in statistical dead heat: Bolsonaro 46.3% vs Lula 46.2%
signals.investor_impact: Brazilian asset prices will face increasing volatility as the October election approaches; Bolsonaro candidacy signals potential return to more market-friendly policies.

signals.description: Pakistan says 'no dialogue' with Afghanistan as cross-border attacks persist
signals.investor_impact: Regional instability creates risk for China's Belt and Road investments in Pakistan; refugee flows and border closures will disrupt trade in Central/South Asia.

signals.description: Zelenskyy to announce wartime elections plan and peace deal referendum on war anniversary
signals.investor_impact: Any viable peace process would be transformative for Ukrainian reconstruction assets and European energy security; still early-stage with major obstacles.

signals.description: Defense spending in sub-Saharan Africa jumped 19% in 2025
signals.investor_impact: Rising defense budgets crowd out development spending across the region; creates opportunities for defense equipment exporters targeting African markets.

signals.description: Ethiopia military buildup near Tigray after TPLF captures disputed border towns
signals.investor_impact: Renewed Ethiopian internal conflict threatens the Pretoria peace accord and risks disrupting one of Africa's fastest-growing economies.

signals.description: Gold hits $5,278/oz amid Iran conflict, up from $5,200 earlier in week
signals.investor_impact: Gold's safe-haven rally shows no signs of exhaustion; central bank buying and geopolitical risk premiums continue to support prices well above historical norms.

signals.description: Bitcoin plunges to $63,000 as Iran war triggers $515M in crypto liquidations
signals.investor_impact: Crypto demonstrated correlation with risk assets during geopolitical stress rather than serving as a safe haven; investors rotating into gold and treasuries instead.

signals.description: Iran announces 40 days of mourning after Khamenei's death
signals.investor_impact: Iran faces its most severe leadership crisis since the 1979 revolution; succession uncertainty combined with active warfare creates extreme risk for any Iran-linked assets and regional stability.

signals.description: Recession probability estimates jump from 25-30% to 40-50% on Iran conflict
signals.investor_impact: Sharply elevated recession risk requires portfolio defensive positioning; bond yields may decline on flight-to-quality despite inflationary oil shock creating a policy dilemma for the Fed.

signals.description: ECB holds rates at 2% for fifth consecutive meeting
signals.investor_impact: ECB pause reflects balanced risk assessment; oil price shock from Iran conflict may delay any future rate cuts and push eurozone inflation higher.

signals.description: Federal Reserve holds rates at 3.50-3.75% in January; March meeting scheduled
signals.investor_impact: Higher-for-longer rate environment persists; Iran-driven oil shock creates stagflation risk that limits Fed's ability to cut rates even if growth slows.

signals.description: Pennsylvania special election: Democrat wins comfortably in House District 42
signals.investor_impact: Limited direct market impact; result consistent with district's partisan lean and does not signal broader swing.

signals.description: Iran strikes Israeli school in Minab killing 108+, mostly children
signals.investor_impact: Civilian mass casualty events heighten pressure for international intervention or ceasefire; may accelerate diplomatic isolation of belligerents.

signals.description: Argentina general strike brings Buenos Aires to standstill over labor reform
signals.investor_impact: Labor opposition to reforms remains strong but Milei's legislative victories demonstrate government's ability to push through market-oriented policies.

signals.description: Gaza ceasefire remains fragile; Israel controls over half of Gaza territory
signals.investor_impact: Fragile ceasefire overshadowed by the larger Iran conflict; reconstruction investment remains on hold pending political resolution.

signals.description: Trump-Xi summit planned for March 30 in Beijing amid tariff escalation
signals.investor_impact: High-stakes summit could either escalate or de-escalate US-China trade tensions; markets likely to price in uncertainty leading up to the meeting.

signals.description: Denmark snap election called amid Greenland sovereignty defense platform
signals.investor_impact: Danish defense spending likely to increase regardless of outcome; Arctic resource competition intensifying as geopolitical factor.

signals.description: Iran's IRGC attacks commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz; 3 vessels struck
signals.investor_impact: Shipping and insurance costs will spike dramatically; global supply chains face weeks to months of disruption if Hormuz remains contested.

signals.description: North Korea 9th Party Congress opens; Kim pledges improved living standards
signals.investor_impact: North Korea's nuclear and ICBM modernization plans maintain elevated security risk premium for Northeast Asian assets, particularly South Korean equities.

signals.description: Iran state TV networks compromised with messages attributed to Trump and Netanyahu
signals.investor_impact: Cyber operations increasingly integrated with conventional military campaigns; highlights vulnerability of state media infrastructure in conflict scenarios.

signals.description: EU defense procurement consensus emerging amid US-Europe transatlantic tensions
signals.investor_impact: European defense stocks benefiting from structural spending increase; Rheinmetall, BAE Systems, and Leonardo among beneficiaries of multi-year procurement commitments.

signals.description: Boko Haram massacre kills 170+ in Nigeria's Kwara state
signals.investor_impact: Nigeria's security situation deteriorating in new geographic areas; US troop deployment signals deepening security partnership but also highlights governance challenges.

signals.description: WTO Ministerial Conference to be held in Cameroon; China to push Global South reforms
signals.investor_impact: WTO ministerial outcome could signal direction of global trade governance reform; China's Global South coalition-building has implications for commodity and manufacturing trade flows.

signals.description: Brent crude forecast to spike to $100/barrel if Iran conflict persists
signals.investor_impact: Triple-digit oil prices would be stagflationary, benefiting energy producers while devastating consumers, airlines, and energy-importing emerging markets.

signals.description: US Pentagon hits 1,000 targets in Iran including IRGC facilities, air defenses, and missile sites
signals.investor_impact: US defense spending will likely accelerate; munitions replenishment orders and sustainment contracts will benefit major defense contractors.

signals.description: Iran fires missiles at Bahrain military facilities hosting US assets
signals.investor_impact: Bahrain's small economy and banking sector face acute vulnerability from its frontline position in the Iran conflict; naval base risks elevate insurance and operating costs.

signals.description: 1,700 Africans reported fighting for Russia in Ukraine
signals.investor_impact: Minor direct market impact, but underscores Russia's global recruitment challenges and the complex security relationships between Russia and African nations.

signals.description: Dow futures drop 517 points; S&P 500 futures lose 1% on Iran strike fears
signals.investor_impact: Monday open expected to see further selling pressure; volatility indices likely to spike, creating opportunities for options strategies.
